name: gemini
description: Gemini CLI subagent for delegating tasks that benefit from Google search grounding, 2M token context, or code execution sandbox. Wraps gemini CLI invocation with structured JSON output, model selection, and error handling.

skills.name: Gemini Delegation
skills.description: Delegate tasks to Gemini CLI for search grounding, large diff analysis, or code execution. Use when Claude's native tools are insufficient.

agents.name: Gemini Diff Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes full diffs using Gemini's 2M token context when diffs exceed Claude's truncation threshold

agents.name: Gemini Search Grounded Researcher
agents.description: Performs web research with Google search grounding and returns structured, cited results

agents.name: Gemini Code Executor
agents.description: Verifies algorithms and data transformations using Gemini's Python code execution sandbox

commands.name: Gemini
commands.description: Direct Gemini invocation with model selection

interface.shortDescription: Gemini CLI subagent for delegating tasks that benefit from Google search grounding, 2M token context, or code execution
interface.longDescription: Gemini CLI subagent for delegating tasks that benefit from Google search grounding, 2M token context, or code execution sandbox. Wraps gemini CLI invocation with structured JSON output, model selection, and error handling.
